# A500 OCS CE Tier-A Goldens

This directory is reserved for hardware-truth oracle metadata and hashes for
the Arbor Mnemos Amiga evaluation harness. Do not commit Kickstart ROMs,
commercial disk images, generated framebuffers, audio dumps, or trace captures.

`tools/conformance/amiga_cases.yaml` references per-case roots under this
directory. Populate only redistributable metadata and SHA-256 values for
captures produced from approved physical-hardware workflows.
